name: Honey Walnut Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll each chicken breast in honey until fully coated.
2. Place the honey-coated chicken breasts in a shallow dish containing the mixture of ground walnuts and bread crumbs. Press the coating onto the chicken breasts, ensuring they are evenly covered.
3. Season the chicken with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Place the chicken breasts on a tray or baking sheet and refrigerate for 1 hour.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Bake the chicken breasts in the preheated oven for 45-50 minutes, or until cooked through and golden brown.
From Connecticut Honey by Eastern Connecticut Beekeepers Association
